projects.title: PowerVisualize Portfolio Site
projects.description: Production React + Vite + Tailwind portfolio site demonstrating full-stack capability with interactive data visualizations and serverless API integration.

projects.title: A/B Testing Pipeline
projects.description: Production A/B testing pipeline producing Power BI-friendly CSV outputs with frequentist and Bayesian metrics, including GitHub Action workflow.

projects.title: NYC Flood Risk: Buildings vs Neighborhoods
projects.description: End-to-end geospatial engineering project merging three independent spatial datasets using polygon geometry joins. Spatial ETL performed in Python with PMTiles pipeline for cloud-hosted vector data.

projects.title: LendingClub Financial Credit Risk Lab
projects.description: R-based credit risk console built on LendingClub loan performance data. Trains a logistic regression Probability of Default (PD) model on completed loans, then simulates underwriting policy on a 2016 holdout cohort to show how profit and losses change as you move the approval cutoff across PD deciles.
proof_points: Logistic regression PD model trained on matured, completed loans
Policy simulation that declines ~47% of the riskiest loans while increasing profit by ~$68M on the holdout cohort
Loss-avoidance analysis showing ~$540M in losses avoided at the optimal cutoff
Interactive Shiny console with portfolio overview, driver analysis, PD model diagnostics, and a "Try It" loan input sandbox

projects.title: Mortgage Portfolio Intelligence
projects.description: Analytics engineering stack for a mortgage-style monthly performance book: data lands in Postgres (Neon), is modeled with dbt into marts (KPI long-form series, roll-forward, vintage cohorts, delinquency bucket mix), and is consumed by a React + Vite single-page dashboard with statistical overlays and cohort navigation.
proof_points: Layered SQL transforms with tests and documentation suitable for a governed mart
Dashboard surfaces aligned to portfolio monitoring: KPI significance, roll dynamics, vintage curves, and bucket mix
Same live app can be embedded from Data Projects and opened full-screen when VITE_MORTGAGE_DASHBOARD_URL is configured
